description: Phase 23 scan_claim_effectiveness: reports/n6_claim_effectiveness.json must exist with status=GREEN. Aggregates per-claim fail_count across the audit trail retention window (red_claims[] identity from P16). fail_count=0 flags 'silent' claims — scanners that have never caught a failure in the observed window. Observe-only in P23; a future phase can gate on claims_silent_count once the window is long enough to trust silence ⇒ ineffective.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_claim_effectiveness.json ] && jq -r "if .status == \"GREEN\" then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_claim_effectiveness.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
